summary: A corporate biography of Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw detailing her professional experience, board memberships, global recognitions, and philanthropic commitments. The text is primarily a factual profile but highlights her foundational belief in compassionate capitalism and her mission to provide affordable biopharmaceuticals globally.

principles.rationale: Wealth generated by business should be committed to philanthropic causes to make an enduring impact on society and marginalized communities.

principles.statement: Innovation must be coupled with affordability.
principles.rationale: The ultimate promise of biotechnology is to make lifesaving medicines and world-class healthcare accessible to millions of patients worldwide, regardless of their socio-economic status.
